nasb.text: To You, O God of my fathers, I give thanks and praise, For You have given me wisdom and power; Even now You have made known to me what we requested of You, For You have made known to us the king’s matter.”

esv.text: To you, O God of my fathers, I give thanks and praise, for you have given me wisdom and might, and have now made known to me what we asked of you, for you have made known to us the king’s matter.”

cnv.text: 我列祖的　神啊！我感謝你，讚美你！ 你把智慧和能力賜了給我； 我們向你所求的，現在你已向我顯明， 把王的事告訴了我們。”

ccb.text: 我祖先的上帝啊，我感谢你，赞美你， 因你赐我智慧和能力， 应允我们的祈求， 使我们明白王的梦。”
